src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or specific linting rules enabled by the migration recipe).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial, otherwise a compile error occurs.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 14+ (and strictly enforced in later versions) requires serialVersionUID fields to be annotated with @Serial to prevent accidental serialization of non-serializable classes or incorrect versioning; without it, compilation may fail with 'serializable class ... has no serialVersionUID' or similar warnings treated as errors in strict builds.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without this import, the code will not compile due to an unresolved symbol.
